problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: The key to Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? is Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene — specifically Viral vector delivery — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
